enrichment method: purified from E. coli overproducing FLAG-tagged Rhs1 and Strep-tagged EagR by Streptag affinity
fragmentation method: HCD fragmentation with a normalized collision energy (NCE) set up to 26.
instrument: analyzed by nanoLC-MS/MS using an EASY-nLC™ 1200 system coupled to the nanoelectrospray ion source of an Orbitrap Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer.
ionization type: coupled to the nanoelectrospray ion source of an Orbitrap Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer.
